violations.text: Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Rice observed in the walk-in cooler at 44 degrees F. Voluntary disposal during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Rice was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods reviewed. Cooling log provided. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
Knife observed stored between 2 prep stations. Knives must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
